# Primorum
> Primorum finds $100K+ in AI-automatable operations in your business — or tells you there's nothing worth doing. System 2 layer on top of frontier AI. Guaranteed outcomes. Free audit. Based in Toronto.

## Core
- [Primorum](https://primorum.ai/): We'll find $100K+ in automatable operations or tell you there's nothing worth doing. The audit is free, concrete, and delivered within a week: dollar figure, named tools, build estimates, phased roadmap. If the number is there, we can build it — fixed price, guaranteed delivery, refund if not delivered.
- [Free AI Operations Audit](mailto:engage@primorum.ai): Request via engage@primorum.ai

## Contact
- General: engage@primorum.ai
